name: Bothwell Hospital Employees
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving healthcare professionals and Bothwell Regional Health Center employees in Sedalia, Missouri since 1972, offering savings accounts, loans, and financial services.
description_long:
Bothwell Hospital Employees Credit Union was founded in 1972 by Mike Matchael with a mission to help healthcare workers save money and access affordable loans. As a democratically operated, not-for-profit financial cooperative, it has served the health care industry supporting Bothwell Regional Health Center in Sedalia, Missouri for over 50 years. The organization is governed by a volunteer board of directors and supervisory board elected by members.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including multiple savings account types (regular savings, money market, Christmas Club, Education Savings, Emergency Fund), share certificates, VISA cards, debit cards, and various loan products (vehicle, signature, secured, and student loans). They provide mortgage services, retirement planning options (IRA, 401(k), TSA, UGMA), investment services including 529 college savings plans, and insurance products covering vehicle, home, life, and health coverage. Additional services include credit counseling, free credit reports, tax preparation, mobile and online banking, and travel discounts.

What distinguishes Bothwell Hospital Employees Credit Union is its specialized field of membership focused exclusively on healthcare professionals and their families. Eligibility extends to physicians, healthcare professionals, nursing facility employees, hospice workers, in-home care providers, ambulance service staff, medical and dental students, pharmacy workers, and their immediate families. This niche focus allows them to tailor products specifically to the needs and financial situations of healthcare workers. The organization maintains a small, local operation with just two full-time staff members and volunteer leadership, keeping overhead low.

The primary limitation is geographic and membership restriction—this is a small, local credit union serving only those with eligibility ties to Bothwell Regional Health Center and the Sedalia, Missouri community. Members should have a connection to the healthcare industry or be family of someone who does. The limited staff and volunteer model means fewer resources for product development compared to larger financial institutions, though this also translates to lower costs for members through competitive rates.
services: Regular savings accounts and money market accounts
Specialty savings clubs (Christmas Club, Travelers Club, Education Savings, Emergency Fund)
VISA credit cards and Espree debit cards
Vehicle loans, signature loans, secured loans, and student loans
Retirement planning (IRA, 401(k), TSA, UGMA) and retirement management
Investment services including 529 college savings and market watch
Insurance products (vehicle, home, life, health, credit life, credit disability, GAP coverage, mechanical repair warranty)
Credit counseling and free credit report access
Online and mobile banking with e-statements
Travel services, Sprint cellular discounts, and Direct TV discounts
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure ensures profits are returned to members through competitive rates and lower fees
Established 50+ year history (founded 1972) demonstrates stability and longevity serving the same community
Comprehensive financial services under one roof including loans, investments, insurance, and retirement planning
Specialized focus on healthcare professionals allows products and services tailored to medical industry needs
Free credit counseling and free credit report access provided to members
Family member eligibility extends to immediate relatives even if the healthcare worker isn't a member
NCUA insurance protection for member accounts up to $250,000 per account category
cons: Strict field of membership eligibility limits access to healthcare professionals and their families only
Very small operation with only 2 full-time employees limits service capacity and product innovation
Limited geographic footprint with single branch location in Sedalia, Missouri may inconvenience remote members
No mention of mobile app or robust digital banking infrastructure compared to larger credit unions
Limited hours of operation (9am-5pm Monday-Friday) restrict member access outside business hours
best_for: Healthcare professionals (physicians, nurses, therapists) seeking competitive rates on loans and savings
Bothwell Regional Health Center employees and their immediate family members
Healthcare workers wanting consolidated financial services with industry-specific expertise and understanding
diagnosis: Best for healthcare workers employed at or with family ties to Bothwell Regional Health Center in Sedalia, Missouri seeking a stable, member-owned financial institution with specialized understanding of medical industry needs. Main caveat: membership is restricted by field of eligibility, and the small operation may lack the technological sophistication and service availability of larger regional or national credit unions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Bothwell Hospital Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in SEDALIA, MO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
